# Google AI Studio

> AI Registry entry [AIR-8](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-8/google-ai-studio) — status **Production** as of 2026-05-04. Departments: ai-office.

**Category:** AI Model API Platform / Development Console
**Cost per User/Month:** $100 (usage-based API credits)
**Number of Licences:** 1
**Total Monthly Cost:** $100
**Departments:** AI Policy

## Overview

Google's web-based development environment for prototyping with Google's generative AI models ([[gemini|Gemini]]). Low-code interface for prompt engineering, model testing, API key generation. Bridge between consumer Gemini and production Vertex AI.

## Capabilities

* Prompt engineering and testing
* Model comparison (side-by-side)
* Structured prompts with templates
* API key management
* Tuning — fine-tune Gemini on custom datasets
* Context caching
* Code export (Python, JS, cURL)
* Search grounding for factual accuracy
* Generous free tier + paid usage via [[google-cloud|Google Cloud]] billing

## Security & Compliance

* Inherits Google Cloud compliance
* Paid API calls not used for training; free tier may be
* Google Cloud IAM, API key restrictions

*AI Office infrastructure. Single licence managed by AI Policy.*
